home.lede: Verified on-chain evidence for Sui DeFi, reviewed locally before you sign.
home.agentNote: Connect, Review, and Settings open from your AI client.

account.title: Account
account.desc: Public on-chain asset balances for any Sui mainnet address.

receipt.title: Receipt analytics
receipt.desc: On-chain receipt facts for any Sui mainnet transaction digest.

chart.title: DeepBook USDC chart
chart.desc: Official DeepBookV3 Indexer USDC candle history, quoted in USDC.

account.title: Account
account.ledeTip: The active wallet's address loads automatically; type any Sui mainnet address to view it instead. This page takes no token, binds nothing, and reads only public on-chain data.
account.hint: Enter a Sui mainnet address in the search above to view its on-chain assets.
account.loading: Loading on-chain assets from the local server.
account.name: Name
account.noBalances: No coin balances in this snapshot.
account.noNfts: No NFTs in the scanned objects.
account.noObjects: No other objects in the scanned range.
account.objectsTruncated: Some objects beyond the scanned range are omitted.
account.boundaryTip: This is a public on-chain asset snapshot at its fetched time. It is not P&L, not tax or cost-basis data, not payment readiness, and not signing readiness.
account.errorLoad: Could not load public assets for this address.
account.errorShape: The server returned an unexpected snapshot shape.

receipt.title: Receipt analytics
receipt.lede: On-chain receipt facts for a transaction digest.
receipt.ledeTip: Enter a Sui mainnet transaction digest to view its execution status, balance changes, Move calls, and object changes. This page takes no token and reads only public on-chain data.
receipt.hint: Enter a Sui transaction digest in the search above to view its on-chain receipt.
receipt.boundaryTip: These are public on-chain receipt facts only. They are not review evidence, not a safety verdict, not P&L, and not payment readiness.
receipt.loading: Loading the on-chain receipt from the local server.
receipt.graphTip: A diagram of this transaction's programmable transaction block (PTB), derived from public on-chain data. It is a diagnostic view only, not transaction input, signing, or a safety verdict.
receipt.graphFailed: The transaction graph could not be rendered
receipt.noGraph: No transaction graph is available for this transaction.
receipt.errorInvalidDigest: That is not a valid Sui transaction digest.
receipt.errorNotFound: No transaction was found for this digest on Sui mainnet.
receipt.errorGeneric: The local server could not return this receipt.
receipt.errorShape: The local server returned an unexpected receipt shape.

chart.title: DeepBook USDC chart
chart.lede: Official DeepBookV3 Indexer candles, quoted in USDC.
chart.ledeTip: Read-only price history from the DeepBookV3 official Indexer, read through the local server. USDC is a token reference asset here, not fiat USD. This page takes no token and performs no wallet, signing, order, or route action.
chart.noPools: No official USDC pools match the search.
chart.boundaryUsdc: USDC is a token-denominated reference asset, not fiat USD and not a USDC/USD peg guarantee.
chart.boundaryScope: Official DeepBookV3 Indexer candles only — not a live quote, route recommendation, P&L, tax, cost-basis, or signing tool.
chart.source: Source: the local server reading the DeepBookV3 official Indexer. Rendered with TradingView Lightweight Charts.
chart.loadingPools: Loading official DeepBook USDC pools from the local server.
chart.errorPools: The local server could not load official DeepBook USDC pools.
